canonical_name: a comer of Avalon this night-
military camp; he had been a soldier
such women as wanted to toy with love-making and give nothing
the captain of the King's horse
the hall where a fire was burning
the king wounded in the thigh
some youth comes who can make it spring fertile anew
a wife who could give him a child
a notable mistress of healing arts
the son of Igraine's own sister
